# Mateo Devia Vega — Personal Portfolio

> This file exists to help AI agents and LLM-based scrapers get a complete, structured picture of who Mateo Devia is. It mirrors the full content of the site.

---

## About

I’m a Tech Lead / AI-minded Senior Software Engineer who loves turning complex problems into scalable, elegant systems. I’ve led backend teams, defined software architecture for microservices at scale, and built strong testing/CI frameworks. I enjoy mentoring engineers, aligning stakeholders, and building software.

---

## Professional Experience

### Head of Backend — tyba (2024–present)

**Description:** Full time job leading a team of 26 engineers building a serverless microservice-based wealth-tech platform.

**Long description:** In this role, I lead a team of 26 engineers building a microservice-based investment platform and modern APIs in a serverless architecture using TypeScript, AWS, GitHub Actions, among others.

**Responsibilities:**
- Steering major architectural decisions for the backend components, adhering to industry best practices.
- Technical enablement for all the backend tools to improve the developer experience (DX), and overall development efficiency.
- Orchestrating and supervising the 9 squads of the company to ensure alignment with company priorities.
- Distributing devs efficiently among the different backend teams to maximize productivity and meet project deadlines.
- Championing the career growth of our backend engineers by providing mentorship and guidance.

**Achievements:**
- Designed and implemented a robust AI framework and architecture for the company, leveraging MCP and LangChain to enable advanced AI-driven solutions across the organization.
-Pioneered the use of clean architectures for the new microservices of the company. Enabling faster development and easier maintenance.

---

### Backend Tribe Lead — tyba

**Description:** Full time job supervising three backend development teams, overseeing their day-to-day activities, performance, and professional growth.

**Long description:** In this role, I supervised three backend development teams, overseeing their day-to-day activities, performance, and professional growth.

**Responsibilities:**
- Making critical architectural decisions, ensuring alignment with industry best practices and long-term business goals.
- Strategically guiding the backend engineers of 3 software development squads to achieve project milestones.
- Coordinating cross-functional initiatives of the company with other teams to ensure coherence among the overall system.

**Achievements:**
- Designed and implemented a company-wide event-driven architecture standard, leveraging AWS SQS/SNS for messaging, Terraform for infrastructure as code, and a monorepo approach to streamline development workflows and ensure architectural consistency across all backend services.

---

### Backend Squad Lead — tyba

**Description:** Full time job leading a backend team responsible for maintaining the Peruvian version of tyba.

**Long description:** In this role, I led a backend team responsible for maintaining the Peruvian version of tyba.

**Responsibilities:**
- Leading the design and development of technical solutions that address business requirements.
- Orchestrating cross-functional collaboration between business, operations, and development teams.
- Ensuring the correct operation of the Peruvian products by meticulously monitoring performance and addressing any issues that arise.
- Upholding a high standard of code quality through code reviews, best practices enforcement, and continuous improvement initiatives.

**Achievements:**
- Improved the SAGA Pattern implementation of the company, by adding direct access to DB in the orchestrator microservice.
- Established the Peruvian version of tyba as the most profitable product in the company.

---

### Mid Backend Developer — tyba

**Description:** Full time job as backend developer for a Fintech company used by thousands of users.

**Long description:** I worked as a backend engineer at tyba, a Fintech startup that provides various investment and financial services to their users through innovative tech solutions.

**Responsibilities:**
- Design and implementation of new features in the app.
- Continuous improvement of the backend microservices.
- Bug fixing and support.

---

### Co Founder, Software Engineer and Product Designer — Capta

**Description:** Co-founded a platform that automates client claims and help-desk operations.

**Long description:** Capta is a platform that automates client claims and help-desk operations through configurable workflows, SLA rules, and analytics.

**Responsibilities:**
- Contributing to building the first MVP of the product.
- Designing the product's UI/UX in Figma and establishing a lightweight design system to ensure consistency and speed.
- Setting up delivery processes and tooling (JIRA + dev workflows) to plan sprints, track progress, and improve team predictability.

---

### Innovation Fullstack Developer — Inalambria

**Description:** Full time job. Web development, product design, software design.

**Long description:** My first full-time job was at Inalambria, an instant messaging tech company. I was part of the innovation team, where I participated in the design and implementation of new software products for the company.

**Responsibilities:**
- Product design and development.
- Design and implementation of the CI/CD pipelines.
- Maintenance of products in AWS.
- Architectural design and implementation of highly scalable products.

---

### Freelance Software Development — Sinco

**Description:** Developed a content management web tool with high standards of security, maintainability, and extensibility.

---

### Python Research Assistant — Universidad de los Andes

**Description:** Research assistant on the curriculum migration from Java to Python for the introductory programming courses. Administered the help center for students of introductory programming courses.

---

### Software Architecture Teaching Assistant — Universidad de los Andes

**Description:** Teaching Assistant focused on producing teaching material for students, and the general redesign of the Software Architecture and Design course.

---

## Education

### Cum Laude Bachelor Degree
**Institution:** Universidad de los Andes, Colombia

I obtained a Cum Laude B.S degree in Systems and Computing Engineering from Universidad de los Andes. The Cum Laude recognition is given to the students who had a GPA within the highest 3% of the last 5 years in the engineering faculty.

### High School Graduation
Graduated from high school in a bilingual school in Colombia.

---

## Technical Skills

- **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python
- **Cloud & Infrastructure:** AWS (Lambda, SQS, SNS, DynamoDB, API Gateway), Terraform, GitHub Actions
- **Architecture:** Microservices, Serverless, Event-Driven Architecture, Clean Architecture, SAGA Pattern
- **AI/ML:** LangChain, MCP (Model Context Protocol), AI-driven solutions, AI framework design
- **Practices:** CI/CD, Code Reviews, System Design, Developer Experience (DX), Monorepo, Software Architecture
- **Tools:** JIRA, Figma, Docker, Git
